features.featureTitle: Audit and fix the Settings page (frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx) to ensure all settings controls are fully functional: the Gemini API key input field must correctly read the stored key from the backend, save it on submit, and display validation feedback; the default timeframe selector (M1/M5/M10) must load the persisted value and update it via the backend mutation; the AI sensitivity slider must load and save correctly; the theme toggle must apply the selected theme immediately; and the daily operation limit selector must load the current value and trigger the setDailyOperationLimit mutation on change. All save actions must show a Portuguese success or error toast.

Audit and fix frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts and frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure the backend actor calls for getSettings, updateSettings, getGeminiApiKey, setGeminiApiKey, getDailyOperationProgress, and setDailyOperationLimit are correctly wired. Verify that the Motoko function signatures in backend/main.mo match the frontend call signatures and fix any mismatches that would cause settings to fail silently.
